reviews.review_title: My hunt is done and I'm satisfied
reviews.review_description: I searched all day every day to find a rugby training game with body collision physics without being clunky and a mess. But this game is simple and smooth, no lag, no bugs. Though it is a good tackling and dodging game, there could be a few add-ons that I wouldn't mind paying for, like key features of a professional rugby match like scrums, kicking, scoring trys, more bot modification settings, maybe in the run the gauntlet mode we could be the one that runs with our joystick trying to sidestep while holding a rugby ball kinda like a 1v1 rugby match, possibly multiplayer? But I have seen on their social media channels they have just started uploading again since mid 2025 yesterday which is good timing.

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the great review, Ghostface44! Really glad to hear DodgeCraft delivered exactly what you were looking for.

We put a lot of focus into making the gameplay smooth, responsive, and free from the clunkiness you often get with physics-based sports games, so it’s awesome to hear that stood out to you.

Appreciate you taking the time to share this and we’re glad your search led you to DodgeCraft!

reviews.review_description:
I play a lot of fitness games, it's why I bought my quest 3 back in 2023. This has become the #1 fitness app for me. It brings me back to when I'd play sports, you know, like using real athleticism as you would in rugby or hockey or football. 

For example, the dodge mode-- there are times where I'm just totally reacting by instinct when the meteors all align and follow up each other just right and then I'm ducking and twisting and backstopping or side hopping consecutively by pure reflex because there's just no time in those moments to think.. and I love those moments!

That all being said, I wish there was an even higher difficulty, but one that would set itself apart even more than the others do, creating those moments I mentioned above, all of the time. Could even make the green portals even further (and smaller) away, to take more  concentration to make the throw. And therefore more concentration away from the meteors coming at you. Even if none of this happens, it's an awesome fitness app, I love playing it in mixed reality, and it's such fun motivation when somebody beats your score because you push harder each time until you gain your spot back.

developer_response.body:
Hi Gosyck,

Thank you so much for your detailed review—we love hearing that the game has become your #1 fitness app! The way you describe those instinctive, fast-reaction moments is exactly the type of athletic flow we aim to create, so it’s great to know it resonates with you like real sports do.

We also really appreciate your suggestion for an even higher difficulty mode. In the meantime, we’re thrilled that mixed reality and the competitive scores are keeping you motivated. Thanks again for your support—it means a lot to the team.

– The INCISIV Team

reviews.review_description: DodgeCraft is a blast of energy in VR! This game will have you ducking, diving, and even lying flat on the ground to dodge incoming objects. Some can be punched, others avoided—it’s full-body action all the way. One standout feature is the alternate mode that combines fast-paced movement with tackling mechanics, reminiscent of dodgeball, rugby, or football. Whether you're training your agility or just having fun, DodgeCraft delivers a seriously engaging workout wrapped in high-octane gameplay. Fun, sweaty, and highly replayable! Recommended!!!!!!

developer_response.body: Hi metaquesta99 - thanks so much for the 5 star review! It's awesome you're using it to get a great workout!

reviews.review_description:
It is a good workout , but with only two game modes , I don't feel like there is enough content to justify the 20 dollar pricetag for this game. I thought it was
early access then I realized it was the full game

developer_response.body: Hi Egyptahmed – Thank you so much for taking the time to share your thoughts! We’re glad to hear you enjoyed the workout aspect of the game. We’ve focused the core experience around two modes that are grounded in sports science and research, especially around evasion training in rugby. That said, we really appreciate your feedback on content!

reviews.review_description: Haven't played it yet but I'm very excited to play it since it's made by the wonderful people at INCISIV

developer_response.body: Hi CobyCoba - thanks for the amazing review!

reviews.review_description: Great game! Dodging meteors is fun but run the gauntlet is VR cinema. Trying to beat your own high score adds a sense of progression and makes it way more intense - it really does make it seem like you're defending for your life. I felt like I won the super bowl when I absolutely Sean Taylor'ed this robot to beat my previous score.

developer_response.body: @GravyDavy thanks so much for your review - we're so pleased you felt like you won the Super Bowl :) - keep trying to smash those high scores!

reviews.review_description: I jumped into Dodgecraft expecting a fun challenge, and it delivered even more than I anticipated! The mix of dodging blocks, taking on waves of incoming AI, and swiping balls away from the end zone keeps the action fast-paced and engaging. It’s a great blend of movement and strategy that feels both intense and rewarding. The gameplay is super addictive, and with each session, you’ll find yourself wanting to push for a better score. Definitely worth checking out!

developer_response.body: Hi JordddLS99 - thanks so much for the awesome review! We're delighted DodgeCraft's AI put you through your paces!

reviews.review_description: I saw the videos and thought it wasn’t going to be as intense as it was and in the long I regret my arrogance. It’s made me stumble many times but it’s addicting and the music keeps the hype going. You should definitely give it a try. You’ll come back to it often

developer_response.body: @KadzBBX - thanks so much for your great review - we're delighted you think it's a great workout and also like the music!

reviews.review_description:
I played it too much- my doctor says i need help 💀





still fun 5 stars just maybe i will duck a point for that.

developer_response.body: Hi coldpandavr.official - thanks for the review! Awesome you're burning so many pounds playing the game!

reviews.review_description: This game is amazing and loads of fun! The only thing I'd say is make sure you play in a bit if a large area because I've hit myself a few times haha. But in all seriousness incredible game! Love it! 🙏

developer_response.body: Hi thatguyvr_ thanks so much for your great review!! Delighted you’re having fun with DodgeCraft 😄

reviews.review_description: This game helped me get better in sports and gave me greater reflexes! Thank you, dodgecraft!

developer_response.body: Hi Mert4235 - thanks so much for the 5 star review! It's awesome DodgeCraft is making your reflexes sharper!

reviews.review_description: Having played this game from early access - it’s a serious workout. Run the Gauntlet has you moving rapidly from side to side trying to avoid being deceived then you hop into Dodge’Em and are ducking for your life! A great arcade style app for those who want something a bit higher energy

developer_response.body: Thanks very much @js_meta for your great review - we're delighted you find DodgeCraft is a serious workout and that you like how the two different game modes have you moving in a different way! Thanks again

reviews.review_description: Defiantly should try also really kind creators of the game

developer_response.body: Hi baileymck - thanks so much for the 5* review and your kind words!!

reviews.review_description: There's a lot to love here, but my favorite has to be the Red Rover style gameplay that has me checking and clotheslining the motion captured runners before they cross my living room in Mixed Reality. It's a unique design of having blocks or runners come through one portal, pass through my Mixed Reality space, and then exit through another portal behind me. A fun experience all around!

developer_response.body: Hi M4cheteColletti - thanks so much for the great review! We're delighted you're enjoying it, especially the mixed reality modes!

reviews.review_description: I’m not a rugby or American football player but I feel like I could play run the gauntlet for hours, it’s great if you like contact sports and want to tackle people

developer_response.body: Hi Staffordwhat2 - Thanks for your amazing review, we're delighted you found the game good fun!

reviews.review_description:
DODGECRAFT is a series work out, if you are in to fitness then this is 100% for you.
The game looks great, the music is great and it’s all-round brilliant experience.

Absolutely recommend.

developer_response.body: Hi SonnyG84 - thanks for your amazing review! We're delighted you found the game a great workout!

reviews.review_description: If You Want to Test Your Dodging Skills, This App is the Best For You!

developer_response.body: Thanks for the 5 star review Wetiq!

reviews.review_description: The graphic so visually appealing. This is an amazing fully immersive experience, I’ve lost 2 pounds since I got it. Can’t recommend enough!!!

developer_response.body: Hi @SillySphynx4676 - thanks for your great review - we're delighted to hear you find the graphics to be really appealing AND that you lost 2 pounds playing it :) Thanks again!

reviews.review_description:
"Whether you’re more of a dodger or a shover, DodgeCraft should be right up your alley. With two fun gameplay modes, a simple but effective tutorial, and an adjustable play area, there’s more than enough here to keep you entertained for the price. There aren’t many fitness games that keep me engaged, but this sure is one of them."
Read the full review over at The Elite Institute

developer_response.body: Hi The_Elite_Institute - thank you so much for your kind words! We also highly recommend checking out the full review over at The Elite Institute! We're delighted you found DodgeCraft gave you an engaging and effective workout.

reviews.review_description: Got it as soon as it came out and its so addictive! Really enjoy the physics in Run the Gauntlet and Dodge Em feels so satisfying when your ducking and weaving!

developer_response.body: Hi Hinchy98 - thanks for your awesome review! We hope you keep dodge, duck, dip, dive and dodging!
